title: Watch — Schneider Experience Centre tour
artistDisplayBio: Spaciux: Platinum • Schneider: 3,000 sqft • Format: AI · IoT
medium: A 3,000-sqft Schneider Electric Experience Centre showcases voice-activated AI, parametric audio and IoT — winning FOAID's Innovative Experience Centre of the Year. Spaciux Platinum, Young Designer of the Year and A.C.E.D. recognitions follow.
